name: zinput_joystick_acquire_device
description: zInput::DI_AcquireJoystickDevice returns zero without a joystick, otherwise returns whether the DirectInput Acquire call succeeded.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_joystick_acquire_device failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 21 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 28, VC object size 32, 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zinput_joystick_acquire_device/verify/471fb0_byte_triage.txt.
The reviewed byte drift is boolean return materialization after the DirectInput Acquire call: current VC emits neg/sbb/inc while the original uses xor/test/sete/mov.
